T0184.title: Spouse Lookup
T0184.definition: An illicit service for querying a target's spouse information through API vulnerabilities or social engineering databases.
T0184.description: Black market actors refer to spouse information as 'po' and obtain it through two main methods: real-time querying via system API vulnerabilities, or retrieval from previously leaked social engineering databases. Acquiring spouse information is commonly used to aid fraud, blackmail, or to complete a target's social relationship map.
T0184.usageExample: "National text-based 'po' with marriage/divorce status, bonus: both parties' frequently used phone numbers, with dates, instant delivery."
